entry.title: Which SAP should I choose ?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am from non technical/IT background but trying to land a job in data analytics. For the last 5 months, I have been constantly learning Python, SQL and Tableau. Some people also advised me to learn SAP as one of ETL tools. However, i got confused because there are too many SAP module such as SAP BODS, SAP ABAP, SAP EDI, SAP S/4 HANA and many more. I don't know which one should I focused on. I thought all modules of SAP were under ETL tools.

Based on what I read, SAP S/4 HANA is the latest version of SAP. Can you guide and advices me which one should I choose ?

Regards,

Aina

entry.title: Sap sd certification
entry.content:
Hi

How many types of certification are there fir SAP SD ? Give the names of certification?

entry.title: Career prospects of SAP Fiori/UI5 vs ABAP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am learning SAP UI5/Fiori. However I was an ABAP developer for two years over a decade ago. But I was not into SAP for a decade and am entering it again now.

My question is that is SAP UI5/Fiori is a good career or ABAP.

Thank you,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Sales and Distribution certification.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My Friend has knowledge (no certification) of SAP SD with ECC then which certification should he undergo?
I found following certification codes but not sure exact purpose of these it will be helpful if you can explain purpose of theses codes as well.

- C_TS462_2021

- C_S4CSC_2302

- C_TS460_2021

Thanks in advance,
Ninad.

entry.title: SAP HCM or SAP SF
entry.content: I want to start my career in HR which on I go SAP HCM or SAP SF

entry.title: How to become Sap-Mm consultant from an end user system network
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am seeking advice on how to become an SAP MM consultant.

I have never been a SAP consultant, or worked as a consultant before. I have 2 years of experience as a end user using modules MM.

I want to work in MM as an SAP consultant also I have relevant qualifications, tell me what will I do..

Thanks and regards,

Niraj mourya

entry.title: Tailoring a Learning Path: Navigating SAP as a New Technical Consultant
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm at a bit of a juncture and could really use your sage advice. My ambition is to grow into a more technically proficient SAP consultant. My professional background is in HR SAP consulting, where my tasks included producing straightforward reports from SE16N, crafting functional specifications, and general system use. However, I haven't had the opportunity to work on system customization or venture into ABAP yet.

Recently, I've started a role as a more technical SAP consultant, dealing with a bespoke module that utilizes the SAP ERP-HCM, ERP 6.0 | EHP8, and Netweaver 7.5 infrastructure. Just for clarity, we are not using HCM Infotypes, and SAP HANA is also not in use. Instead, we're working with a MySQL database.

I'm determined to strengthen my weak areas and create a learning path for the technical elements of SAP. The problem is, the information available online is quite overwhelming, and I'm hoping this fantastic SCN community can lend a hand.

To begin with, I foresee the need to prepare Technical Design Specification (TDS) documents for customizations or for developers - this could involve ALV reports, Z Infotypes, interfaces, or system customizations.

Here's the challenge: due to my recent professional transition and the unique, customized module and specific infrastructure I'm working with in my organization, I'm unable to find a roadmap that perfectly fits my situation.

So, here's where I seek your assistance: Can we collectively devise a learning roadmap that's tailored to my unique circumstances? I would greatly appreciate recommendations on learning resources, and if you have any advice on what environment or software I should practice in. Currently, my company does not have a sandbox, or at least not one that I'm aware of...

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Recruiting - (Carreers) Report refer job to a friend and collaborator
entry.content:
Hi Community!!

I have a doubt about the way to refer a Job to a Friend (external) and a Collab (Internal) i want to have a Report with the information about of the candidate, for example the candidate id, name, referred by, the status, and if the candidate was applied or not, and also the Referral type. I create an inform with the columns "Referrals liked on Job Requisition " but a lot of information is missing. Does anybody have created an inform like this?

Also i realized that when I refer a person (Friend or collab) the report is on blank, until the person apply to the vacancy, is that similar to you?

entry.title: Seeking Career Advice: Transitioning from SAP ABAP HR to SAP Analytics Cloud.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to seek your insights and guidance as I navigate a crucial point in my career journey. I recently graduated and have spent the past year working as a SAP ABAP HR developer, gaining valuable industry experience.

Considering my status as a recent graduate and my year-long exposure to SAP ABAP HR development, I am contemplating a shift towards SAP Analytics Cloud. This field has captured my interest due to its dynamic nature and potential for growth. However, I am keen on gathering expert opinions to make an informed decision about this potential career transition.

I have a few specific questions I would greatly appreciate your input on:

  • As a fresh graduate with a background in SAP ABAP HR, would transitioning to SAP Analytics Cloud be a logical step forward?
  • Are there any skills or knowledge from my SAP ABAP HR role that could be transferrable and advantageous in the context of SAP Analytics Cloud?
  • Considering the current job market, what are the prospects for professionals specializing in SAP Analytics Cloud, especially for someone like me who is new to the field?
  • Could you recommend accessible learning resources or training paths that would help me acquire the necessary skills for a role in SAP Analytics Cloud?
  • Given my status as a fresher, what challenges might I face during this transition, and are there any crucial factors I should take into account?

I am committed to aligning my career path with my passion and skills, and SAP Analytics Cloud seems to hold significant promise in that regard. Your collective insights, experiences, and advice would provide me with invaluable guidance during this pivotal time.

Thank you for your time and expertise; I am eager to learn from your perspectives.

Best regards,

Subhangini

entry.title: Begin a Career in SAP for fresher
entry.content:
2023 MCA Pass Out. Wanna start my career in SAP but don't know where to start and how to progress the learning aspect to gain knowledge about SAP.

If looking for a startup in SAP, all it needs is experience. It's quite unfair for the fresher.

Please support and guide 😊

entry.title: Best Practices - SAP /4 - Downloads
entry.content:
Dearest friends, good morning.

For a long time I am trying to download all Best Practices for SAP 4/HANA but I can't find any website or page where I can download these Best Practices SAP 4/Hana to study and learn. I have academy of SAP SD ECC.

Could someone help me please?

Thank you very much for your attention.

Yours sincerely,

Jason Rodrigues

entry.title: SAP SD Certification for 2 year experience
entry.content:
I have 2 year of SAP SD module experience and I am planning to complete SAP SD certification.

I am not able to find correct certification. Anyone please suggest me which certification I have complete to get best opportunity in SAP SD module.

Please paste certification name in comment

entry.title: Current 2023 SAP MM certification code
entry.content: What version/code of the SAP MM certification would be the most valid one, currently in 2023 ?

entry.title: Test Career site footer text color changed with release
entry.content: As of this software release 2H2023, the footer text on our Test career site is different. It was white text on a red background and now the text is red so it cannot be read. In Manage Career Site, however, it is white text. Is this a bug?

entry.title: Career Consultation
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need guidance for my masters. Currently i am at completion of my bachelors in Economics and Finance. With my background in finance , i have recently initiated my career path in SAP FICO module and i look forward not only mastering this module but aligning myself with relevant modules pertaining in to finance and costing. I have found my interest in ERP and aligning it with functional objects. I require suggestions on options available for fields in masters along with desirable institutes and what qualifications are available to hone my expertise in erp sap/fico/ career path?

entry.title: Switching from D365 FO Consultant to SAP S/4 Hana Functional Consultant Possible?
entry.content:
Hi, All

I have 5 years + of experience in Microsoft Dynamics 365 FinOps (Aka Microsoft Dynamics AX).
I am specialized into SCM module as a functional consultant.
It is quite difficult to look for a D365 FO Consultant role nowadays in Malaysia (Since Ringgit is weak, very costly for upgrade.) yet MNC they will have lot of opportunity. (Very competitive to join MNC. It is because I am competing with talents/elites around the world)
Recently, I have been thinking to give a shot into SAP product. In terms of the paid, demand & opportunities in the market.
Been trying to submit application to few SAP partner companies or End-user companies. They do not put me into consideration. Since I do not have any SAP experience but even though, I do have Supply Chain knowledge.
I really want to switch to SAP from the bottom of my hearth.

If anyone has the same experience as I do. Please feel free to reply.
Or you have any tips to get into SAP product, you may share to me too.
I hope to hear from you all.

Thanks,
Br.
Rain Chong

entry.title: career transformation
entry.content:
hello team,

my self is satyam bhatt and have 8+ years of technology. Now I want to move my career to SAP ABAP technology.

So can someone help me to how to move step by step in future and which module I have to learn and practice

entry.title: Career path (CO or BRIM)
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I'm a junior ABAP developer and I'm thinking of changing my career to a consultant in the future.

I recently got an opportunity to choose between CO or BRIM modules, but I'm having a hard time choosing because of the lack of information about BRIM modules. Please advise which of these two modules would be wiser to choose.

Thanks.

entry.title: Confused how to start a Career in SAP SD, MM
entry.content:
Hi, I have been immigrating to Germany for three years. I have worked in marketing and sales for many years in mostly small companies.

I want to work in SAP Sales & Distribution, I have never worked with SAP. How can I find free resources to learn by myself and take exams? I cannot afford the expensive SAP courses.

My first question: Can I learn by myself and then take an exam?

Is the SAP in Germany job market in demand?

Are there free courses for refugees?

I would really appreciate any help

entry.title: Career Development Plan- notification to manager
entry.content: We need a notification to the manager when an employee creates and saves their Career Development Plan.  Any ideas?
